tts_script: The sound /p/. P says puh. Like in pig, pat, cup.
The sound /b/. B says buh. Like in bat, ball, cub.
The sound /t/. T says tuh. Like in top, tap, hat.
The sound /d/. D says duh. Like in dog, dig, bed.
The sound /k/. C and K say kuh. Like in cat, kite, duck.
The sound /g/. G says guh. Like in go, big, dog.
The sound /f/. F says fff. Like in fun, fish, off.
The sound /v/. V says vvv. Like in van, vest, live.
The sound /th/. Th says thh. Like in thin, math, path.
The sound /th/. Th says thh. Like in this, that, the.
The sound /s/. S says sss. Like in sun, sit, miss.
The sound /z/. Z says zzz. Like in zip, buzz, has.
The sound /sh/. Sh says shh. Like in ship, fish, wish.
The sound /zh/. Like the middle sound in treasure and vision.
The sound /ch/. Ch says chh. Like in chip, much, catch.
The sound /j/. J says juh. Like in jam, gem, judge.
The sound /m/. M says mmm. Like in map, mom, ham.
The sound /n/. N says nnn. Like in nap, sun, know.
The sound /ng/. Ng says nng. Like in ring, song, think.
The sound /l/. L says lll. Like in lip, let, ball.
The sound /r/. R says rrr. Like in run, red, write.
The sound /w/. W says wuh. Like in wet, win, whale.
The sound /y/. Y says yuh. Like in yes, yam, you.
The sound /h/. H says huh. Like in hat, hop, him.
The short A sound. A says /æ/ like ah. Like in cat, map, bag.
The short E sound. E says /ɛ/ like eh. Like in bed, pet, head.
The short I sound. I says /ɪ/ like ih. Like in sit, pig, big.
The short O sound. O says /ɒ/ like oh. Like in hot, dog, mop.
The short U sound. U says /ʌ/ like uh. Like in cup, bus, fun.
The long A sound. A says its name, ay. Like in cake, rain, play.
The long E sound. E says its name, ee. Like in tree, meat, key.
The long I sound. I says its name, eye. Like in bike, night, fly.
The long O sound. O says its name, oh. Like in bone, boat, snow.
The long U sound. U says its name, you. Like in cute, blue, new.
The /oo/ sound. Like in moon, food, blue.
The short /oo/ sound. Like in book, foot, put.
The /oi/ sound. Like in coin, boy, toy.
The /ow/ sound. Like in out, cow, house.
The /aw/ sound. Like in saw, caught, ball.
The /ar/ sound. Like in car, star, farm.
The /er/ sound. Like in her, bird, turn.
The /or/ sound. Like in for, more, store.
The /air/ sound. Like in fair, care, bear.
The schwa sound. A lazy /uh/ sound. Like the A in about or the E in taken.
